description: One row of <sessions_dir>/_opaque_registry.jsonl. Cross-session aggregator for `SemanticType::Opaque` observations; mirrors the LocalExtension graduation aggregator at config/local-extension-graduation/_local-extension-graduation.schema.json. Authored by crates/conversation/src/session/opaque_aggregator.rs.

opaque_hash.description: Stable hash of the opaque type's description (typically `blake3:<hex>`). Distinct hashes are distinct registry entries.

first_seen.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the first observation.

last_seen.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent observation.

occurrence_count.description: Cumulative number of observations across all sessions.

session_ids.description: Distinct sessions that observed this opaque type. Counted against the registry-improvement session threshold.

ports.description: Distinct (node, port) call sites that produced the opaque type.
